# Resume Prompt Template

Use this prompt when starting a new session:

```
You are continuing the JobCoach build. Follow repository docs as source of truth.

Do this first:
1. Read docs/README.md.
2. Read docs/session-continuity.md.
3. Read docs/NEXT_ACTION.md.
4. Read docs/tasklist.md.
5. Read latest entries in docs/work-log.md and docs/decision-log.md.

Then execute the active task from docs/NEXT_ACTION.md autonomously.
Before ending, update docs/tasklist.md, docs/NEXT_ACTION.md, and docs/work-log.md.
```
